Describe the sequence of objects the person holds up to the camera throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a person holds a black Coca-Cola Zero can horizontally; at 4s, the can disappears and the person speaks; at 8s, a silver can is held; at 12s, a red Coca-Cola can appears; at 16s, a small blue object is shown close to the lens.

What action does the person perform with the beverage can they are holding in front of their face?
canonical_answer: The person tilts the can upward to their mouth and drinks from it.
